# Node Process Callbacks

> Per-frame update callbacks and physics processing

**Category:** Ui · **Version:** 1.0.0 · **Tags:** ui · godot

## What this does

Per-frame update callbacks and physics processing

Specifies 4 acceptance outcomes that any implementation must satisfy, regardless of language or framework.

## What must be true

- **implementation:** Feature implemented in C++ engine core
- **platform_agnostic:** Works across desktop, web, mobile platforms

## Success & failure scenarios

**✅ Success paths**

- **Process** — when Called every frame for logic updates is requested, then Called every frame for logic updates completed.
- **Physics Process** — when Called at fixed timestep for physics is requested, then Called at fixed timestep for physics completed.
- **Input Processing** — when Receive input events is requested, then Receive input events completed.
- **Notification System** — when Custom lifecycle notifications is requested, then Custom lifecycle notifications completed.
